title: Eva Addition track 8 question
wikitext:
[]: Eva: Addition track # 8 question             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 28, 2006 12:35 am So today whilst out and about I ended up getting Eva Platinum #6 (it has 22' on it, one of my favorite episodes, damn it! So what if I only have Vols. 1-3 besides that?) I also ended up buying a (bootleg, obviously) of Evangelion: Addition. It's a nice lil thing, including After the End , the Death & Rebirth movie trailers by Misato-san-tachi and various songs (classic pieces as well as OP Main 2 and Ed Main 2), but one thing that throws me off is track 7. It's labeled as a bonus track, and the title is Ladybug's sanba (tentomushi no sanba) http://www.geidai.ac.jp/~odaka/gcat/english/html-text/021.html (Yay, figured out the meaning of this and what a sanba is all on my own. ) and it sounds as if little kids(??) are singing or something like that. What I'm wondering is who is singing (several of the seiyuu?) and what the hell does it have to do with Eva? (maybe it was for the P3II sandbox scene??) Used as BGM at some point maybe? It's short, only about 1 min or 2 long, but still... Anyone out there know?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Dec 28, 2006 8:25 am The track in question should be track 8. You heard it for 3 seconds at the wedding in episode 15.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 28, 2006 3:12 pm Whoops, I read it wrong. (need to pratice my #s in Kanji more!! ^^; ) Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 28, 2006 6:44 pm Hmmm... then when the heck was track 6 Worthy is the Lamb Amen (from Messiah) played in? 24?? :? Or was it included in the CD because the Hallelujah Chorus is here too? *thinks* Also episode 22 when Rei threw the Lancey?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Dec 28, 2006 7:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hmmm... then when the heck was track 6 Worthy is the Lamb Amen (from Messiah) played in? 24?? :? Or was it included in the CD because the Hallelujah Chorus is here too? *thinks* Also episode 22 when Rei threw the Lancey?

Article: Eva Addition track 8 question
[]: Eva: Addition track # 8 question             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 28, 2006 12:35 am So today whilst out and about I ended up getting Eva Platinum #6 (it has 22' on it, one of my favorite episodes, damn it! So what if I only have Vols. 1-3 besides that?) I also ended up buying a (bootleg, obviously) of Evangelion: Addition. It's a nice lil thing, including After the End , the Death & Rebirth movie trailers by Misato-san-tachi and various songs (classic pieces as well as OP Main 2 and Ed Main 2), but one thing that throws me off is track 7. It's labeled as a bonus track, and the title is Ladybug's sanba (tentomushi no sanba) http://www.geidai.ac.jp/~odaka/gcat/english/html-text/021.html (Yay, figured out the meaning of this and what a sanba is all on my own. ) and it sounds as if little kids(??) are singing or something like that. What I'm wondering is who is singing (several of the seiyuu?) and what the hell does it have to do with Eva? (maybe it was for the P3II sandbox scene??) Used as BGM at some point maybe? It's short, only about 1 min or 2 long, but still... Anyone out there know?
